creator: jjrushford@gmail.com
text:
Adafruit Ultimate GPS wiring to pi 4 gpio pins:

GPS card function.    PI 4 GPIO pins
------------------    --------------
VIN                   +5v, pin 2
GND                   ground, pin 5
RX                    pin 4, TXD on uart3
TX                    pin 4, RXD on uart3
PPS                   GPIO pin 18

Note: per instructions RX on GPS is wired to TX on the pi and TX on the GPS to RX on the pi.

Data is received just fine from the GPS on Debian, no data when booted to FreeBSD.
